name: knowledge-master
description: Local-first knowledge graph for developers. Semantic search, blast radius analysis, convention enforcement, and file ownership — all via MCP.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Semantic search across indexed code, docs, and emails with graph context (author, repo, relationships)

tools.name: blast_radius
tools.description: Multi-layer dependency analysis — shows what breaks if you change a file, function, service, or technology

tools.name: safe_to_change
tools.description: Risk assessment combining blast radius + test coverage. Returns safe/risky/dangerous with affected entities

tools.name: who_owns
tools.description: File ownership from git blame weighted by recency (recent changes count more)

tools.name: check_conventions
tools.description: Verify code follows detected team conventions (naming, structure, patterns)

tools.name: index_repo
tools.description: Index a git repository into the knowledge graph
